newsSince: No new company-specific news since June 9. Backdrop: soft Q1'26 (revenue -7% YoY to EUR1,025M, operating EBITDA -26% to EUR97M on weather/volume); FY26 guide ~EUR810M EBITDA (incl. Italcer, EUR30M energy headwind); no structural residential-construction recovery expected. The March 19 NEWS Group (Nordic water-management) acquisition modestly supports the strict water-reuse pathway but predates June 9.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent lens: water-reuse/resilient-campus piping pathway is unchanged since June 9 (NEWS Group water-mgmt deal predates the window). Soft Q1 and no construction recovery offset the qualitative AI-adjacency; nothing new to move the strict screen. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Pipes, building-envelope and Nordic water-management (NEWS Group) products could feed water-reuse and resilient industrial/data-center campuses.
verdicts.neutral: AI-adjacency is qualitative and remote; core construction demand is weak with no structural recovery.
verdicts.bear: -23% YTD reflects depressed residential construction; AI linkage is speculative and indirect on a strict screen.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Water-reuse / resilient-campus demand for piping and envelope products
verdicts.primaryRisk: Weak construction cycle; AI linkage too indirect for a strict screen
